summary: Backend testing of 4 AI generation bug fixes: workout generation with injuries, vegan meal plan protein accuracy, alternate meal foods_to_avoid compliance, and keto carb compliance. All 6 tests PASSED (100% pass rate). Test duration: ~93 seconds.

minor.issue: Template-based meal generation (no preferred_foods) ignores foods_to_avoid. E.g., balanced plan generates 'Grilled Chicken & Rice Bowl' even when foods_to_avoid='chicken'. The post-validation strips chicken from ingredients list but does NOT fix the meal name. Only AI-generation path (preferred_foods specified) enforces foods_to_avoid properly.
minor.priority: MEDIUM - regression risk for template-based plans with dietary exclusions

action_items: OPTIONAL FIX: In template-based meal generation (when preferred_foods is empty), filter out templates whose meal names or ingredients contain foods in foods_to_avoid. Currently only AI-generation respects this. The post-validation at line 3852-3865 removes ingredients but leaves meal names like 'Grilled Chicken & Rice Bowl' intact when chicken is banned.
critical_code_review_comments: Template-based generation path (no preferred_foods) does not pre-filter templates by foods_to_avoid - only AI generation path does. The post-validation only strips ingredients but not meal names, so a meal can still be named 'Grilled Chicken & Rice Bowl' when chicken is banned.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user ID cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b. New meal plans created per test (alternate meal test: plan ID de439841-97d6-4b6a-a731-eb33830be02b).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes have been formally verified and are working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ai_generation_fixes.py covers all 5 review scenarios. Backend is Claude Haiku 4.5 + Sonnet 4.5 hybrid. One minor issue found: template-based meal plan generation doesn't enforce foods_to_avoid in meal names (only AI path does).

test_results_detail.test_2_workout_injuries: PASS - POST /api/workouts/generate with injuries=['shoulders'] returns 200 OK. Generated '3-Day Chest Focus Split' with 18/18 exercises having gif_url. injuries as List[str] working correctly.
test_results_detail.test_3_vegan_protein: PASS - POST /api/mealplans/generate vegan returns 200 OK. Day 1 protein=184g (within 100-220g range). Old inflation bug produced 250g+ - now fixed to natural template values. Meals: High Protein Tofu Scramble (43g P), Seitan & Quinoa Power Bowl (60g P), Tempeh Lentil Curry (56g P), Protein Edamame Bowl (25g P).
test_results_detail.test_4_alternate_no_chicken: PASS - Alternate meal for plan with foods_to_avoid='chicken' generated 'Grilled Salmon & Quinoa Bowl' with salmon, quinoa, sweet potato, broccoli - NO chicken found. PROTEIN_GROUPS filtering working.
test_results_detail.test_5_keto_carbs: PASS - Keto meal plan Day 1 carbs=21g (< 50g limit). Fats=190g. is_low_carb=True correctly bypasses macro inflation.
